{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304335297EC90F01C6CB62A414E"}"},"total":263},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548001250195833624","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来说剧情都挺不错的，就是不够看。也是唯一一本没有受到憋屈的，毕竟穿越者要有穿越者的态度，刚来就深情就没必要了。一般来说母亲死了又舔父亲又。或者两个人都还活着就不断的跪舔，非要诉说一下什么亲情何必呢。除非是同根同源同灵魂。不然中途调包了就少来诉说什么感情关系没有代入感。不要以为抢了别人身体就要讲什么道德了。人从来没有道德，如果有，那只是利益不够罢了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757431997,"group_id":"7541275337380858942","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"修行在天地人，轮回路唤真名。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6er6bt1RuGpM6xodzhVooOj/GyWKYboVKsJnr4mIrgx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/530465529f64421792c6363ba598dbef~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788085&x-signature=33R80l3QRR%2FVfeNSUEsNhGzFXlY%3D","user_id":"1494974781718702","user_name":"🍋证道诸天，修行无情🍋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1494974781718702","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7541275337380858942","book_info":{"abstract":"996程序员秦寿车祸穿成大乾第一纨绔，开局绑定“最强反派系统”。
刚醒就掐亲爹忠勇侯脖子：“老实点，不然提前继承你的爵位！”
转头暴揍当朝太子：“挨顿揍换个储君，殿下这买卖很划算！”
三皇子暗中下套？反手栽赃其谋士通奸，六扇门酷刑伺候直接灭口。
朝堂震动，乾元帝冷笑：“秦家这小子，比朕还会玩！”
直到那天，系统突然警告——
“宿主请注意，真正的‘主角’已抵达京城！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/177c2d3c68ed7746ae463b197654e7b4","author":"神仙姑姑","author_id":"","book_id":"7541275337380858942","book_name":"满级金钟罩：反派从暴打太子开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541275364530602558","read_count":"35309","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1434355"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"667","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,反派,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/118c9d4eac1247ba51a3d67fcda84e77~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395632&x-signature=lKhqs6qNNOxWvgCVIRugEyz1RvE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1758827141424349","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"72"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304335297EC90F01C6CB62A414E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
